## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential content marketing partnership between Sardine and GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/PzkY9umJ-zc_L7rF3pbccRGBvWiqqua6?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers an AI-powered, full-service content production and SEO solution](https://fathom.video/share/PzkY9umJ-zc_L7rF3pbccRGBvWiqqua6?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [Their approach combines expert-guided AI workflows with human editorial oversight](https://fathom.video/share/PzkY9umJ-zc_L7rF3pbccRGBvWiqqua6?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Sardine is looking to scale content production, especially for ABM and vertical-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/PzkY9umJ-zc_L7rF3pbccRGBvWiqqua6?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [GrowthX can potentially replace Sardine's current content agency and SEO consultants](https://fathom.video/share/PzkY9umJ-zc_L7rF3pbccRGBvWiqqua6?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)

## Topics

### Sardine's Content Needs

  - [Adopting ABM (Account-Based Marketing) approach](https://fathom.video/share/PzkY9umJ-zc_L7rF3pbccRGBvWiqqua6?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Need to create content for multiple verticals and sub-verticals](https://fathom.video/share/PzkY9umJ-zc_L7rF3pbccRGBvWiqqua6?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [Current output: 3-5 blogs per month, with some backlog due to bandwidth issues](https://fathom.video/share/PzkY9umJ-zc_L7rF3pbccRGBvWiqqua6?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [Desire to move content lower in the funnel](https://fathom.video/share/PzkY9umJ-zc_L7rF3pbccRGBvWiqqua6?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [High demand for downloadable PDFs from audience](https://fathom.video/share/PzkY9umJ-zc_L7rF3pbccRGBvWiqqua6?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)

### GrowthX's Offering

  - [AI-powered content production system guided by industry experts](https://fathom.video/share/PzkY9umJ-zc_L7rF3pbccRGBvWiqqua6?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Full-service solution including content strategy, creation, SEO, and ongoing optimization](https://fathom.video/share/PzkY9umJ-zc_L7rF3pbccRGBvWiqqua6?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Team includes former leaders from TechCrunch, Fanatics, G2, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/PzkY9umJ-zc_L7rF3pbccRGBvWiqqua6?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [12-week onboarding program to develop content strategy and start execution](https://fathom.video/share/PzkY9umJ-zc_L7rF3pbccRGBvWiqqua6?tab=summary&timestamp=779.0)
  - [Capability to produce 10+ pieces of content per week](https://fathom.video/share/PzkY9umJ-zc_L7rF3pbccRGBvWiqqua6?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)

### GrowthX's Process and Technology

  - [AI workflows for research, outlining, writing, and editing](https://fathom.video/share/PzkY9umJ-zc_L7rF3pbccRGBvWiqqua6?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Integration of multiple data sources (e.g., user.com API, perplexity API, SERP API)](https://fathom.video/share/PzkY9umJ-zc_L7rF3pbccRGBvWiqqua6?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
  - [Vectorized storage of research for efficient retrieval](https://fathom.video/share/PzkY9umJ-zc_L7rF3pbccRGBvWiqqua6?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [Continuous learning and improvement of AI models based on human edits](https://fathom.video/share/PzkY9umJ-zc_L7rF3pbccRGBvWiqqua6?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)

### SEO and Technical Capabilities

  - [Full SEO support included (on-page and technical)](https://fathom.video/share/PzkY9umJ-zc_L7rF3pbccRGBvWiqqua6?tab=summary&timestamp=1881.0)
  - [Experience with complex sites and migrations](https://fathom.video/share/PzkY9umJ-zc_L7rF3pbccRGBvWiqqua6?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
  - [Regular site health checks and optimization recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/PzkY9umJ-zc_L7rF3pbccRGBvWiqqua6?tab=summary&timestamp=1917.0)

### Pricing and Availability

  - Proposal sent separately (not disclosed in transcript)
  - [Limited to two new client kickoffs per week](https://fathom.video/share/PzkY9umJ-zc_L7rF3pbccRGBvWiqqua6?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)
  - [Potential start date for Sardine: April 28th](https://fathom.video/share/PzkY9umJ-zc_L7rF3pbccRGBvWiqqua6?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Eduardo to review the proposal and share with Alex (team member)](https://fathom.video/share/PzkY9umJ-zc_L7rF3pbccRGBvWiqqua6?tab=summary&timestamp=1867.0)
  - [Sardine team to consider GrowthX as a replacement for current content agency and SEO consultants](https://fathom.video/share/PzkY9umJ-zc_L7rF3pbccRGBvWiqqua6?tab=summary&timestamp=1952.0)
  - [Potential follow-up questions or clarifications to be sent via email](https://fathom.video/share/PzkY9umJ-zc_L7rF3pbccRGBvWiqqua6?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Marcel to send meeting recording to Sardine team](https://fathom.video/share/PzkY9umJ-zc_L7rF3pbccRGBvWiqqua6?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
